commands.description: Print values to stdout, space-separated, with newline.
Same as PRINT (newline after output).
Print values space-separated without newline.
Camera-relative world X on XZ plane: yaw#, forward#, strafe#
Camera-relative world Z on XZ plane: yaw#, forward#, strafe#
Same as MOVEX(yaw,f,s)*speed*dt — world X delta this frame
Same as MOVEZ(yaw,f,s)*speed*dt — world Z delta this frame
RND() float in [0,1); RND(n) int in [0,n-1] for integer n>=1.
Inline conditional returning a string; both branches evaluated
Alias of WINDOW.SETTITLE
Resize window (w,h); depth reserved; mode bit0 = high-DPI flag
Resize window (w,h) with defaults: reserved depth and high-DPI mode
Pre-window-open MSAA sample hint (alias of WINDOW.SETMSAA); 2+ enables GPU MSAA hint
Screen-space ambient occlusion (alias of EFFECT.SSAO enable)
Full-screen post shader (alias of POST.ADDSHADER)
Alias of POST.ADDSHADER — full-screen post shader for the render pipeline
Sphere vs box top: landing centre Y or 0.0 if no landing
Best BOXTOPLAND snap Y over count boxes (parallel float arrays)
Alias of LANDBOXES
MOVESTEPX/Z combined — 2-float array [dx,dz]; ERASE when done
Alias for CAMERA.BEGIN: 3D camera handle (heap) from CAMERA.MAKE / CreateCamera
Alias for CAMERA.END (no arguments)
Alias of CAMERA.MAKE — short Blitz-style 3D camera constructor
Blitz-style: type 1=directional, 2=point, 3=spot; optional parent entity# stored for future attachment
Alias of LIGHT.SETRANGE
Alias of LIGHT.SETCOLOR (RGB)
Two-key axis: -1, 0, or 1 (negKey vs posKey)
Input.Axis(neg,pos)*DEGPERSEC(degPerSec,dt) — radians this frame
Alias of INPUT.AXISDEG — orbit / yaw delta this frame
2-float array [forward, strafe] from two Axis pairs; ERASE when done
Alias of INPUT.MOUSEDELTAX
Alias of INPUT.MOUSEDELTAY
Alias of INPUT.MOUSEWHEELMOVE
Warp OS cursor to client pixel (x,y); pair with CURSOR.DISABLE for game-style recenter
Professional: Scan all active handles and print to diagnostics.
Professional: List all registered built-in commands.
Write string to file without appending a newline.
Write string to file and append a newline.
2D ray vs circle — hit?
Distance along ray to hit (0 if miss)
2D ray vs axis-aligned rect (minx,miny,maxx,maxy)
2D ray vs segment (x1,y1)-(x2,y2)
Optional initial gravity (gx#, gy#); same effect as SETGRAVITY after start.
XZ grid with optional Y offset (avoids z-fight with floor at Y=0)
alias of DRAW3D.CUBE — solid axis-aligned box
alias of DRAW3D.CUBEWIRES — wire box
alias of DRAW3D.CUBEWIRES (Blitz3D WireCube spelling)
alias of DRAW3D.SPHERE — solid sphere
alias of DRAW3D.SPHEREWIRES — wire sphere
alias of DRAW3D.GRID — XZ reference grid
alias of DRAW3D.GRID with Y offset
alias of DRAW3D.PLANE — horizontal plane patch
alias of DRAW3D.CAPSULE — solid capsule
alias of DRAW3D.CAPSULEWIRES — wire capsule
Sets spatial audio listener from CAMERA.MAKE handle (call each frame before EmitSound)
Loads WAV/OGG like AUDIO.LOADSOUND; use with Listener + EmitSound for 3D pan/attenuation
Alias of AUDIO.SETSOUNDVOLUME
Alias of AUDIO.SETSOUNDPITCH
Milliseconds since Raylib init (CGO); monotonic wall ms on stub builds
Alias for ENTITY.DRAWALL: draw all entities in the scene graph (no arguments)
Args: (entity#, forward#, right#, up#). Move along entity local axes from pitch/yaw (same as MOVEENTITY / ENTITY.MOVE). For world-space offset use TranslateEntity(entity#, dx#, dy#, dz#).
Args: (entity#, dx#, dy#, dz#). World-space position delta; same as ENTITY.TRANSLATE / ENTITY.TRANSLATEENTITY.
Create empty transform node (entity#) for parenting; invisible, no mesh
Bind entity# to Jolt shared matrix slot index (use BODY3D.BUFFERINDEX on the body)
Remove physics matrix buffer binding from entity#
Reserved 0..31 layer id for future Jolt bitmask filtering (stored on entity)
Alias for ENTITY.COLLISIONLAYER
True if two entities had a Jolt contact since last PHYSICS3D.STEP (Linux+CGO; link via ENTITY.LINKPHYSBUFFER)
Alias for EntityCollided
World normal X from last successful EntityCollided query this frame
World normal Y from last successful EntityCollided query
World normal Z from last successful EntityCollided query
Contact point X (shape query) after last EntityCollided
Contact point Y after last EntityCollided
Contact point Z after last EntityCollided
Alias for CollisionPY (contact Y)
Penetration-depth proxy for impact strength (not true Jolt impulse on this path)
Count Jolt contact pairs involving entity# this frame (distinct from COUNTCOLLISIONS legacy hits)
Stage ray origin for PICK.CAST (Linux+CGO Jolt)
Stage ray direction; length is max travel unless PICK.MAXDIST set
Optional max ray length (normalize direction then scale)
Bit i accepts ENTITY.COLLISIONLAYER i; 0 accepts all
Reserved; non-zero returns error until sphere pick exists
Run Jolt raycast from staged params; returns entity# or 0
Stage ray from camera handle and screen pixels (sets default MAXDIST if unset)
FROMCAMERA then CAST; returns entity# or 0
Last pick hit world X
Last pick hit world Y
Last pick hit world Z
Last pick surface normal X
Last pick surface normal Y
Last pick surface normal Z
Entity# from last pick (linked BODY3D only)
Distance along ray to last hit
Whether last PICK.CAST / SCREENCAST hit
Default 1x1x1 axis-aligned box; returns entity#
1x1x1 box parented to entity# (parent entity id)
Box with width, height, depth (no parent)
Box (w,h,d) parented to entity#

Args: (entity#, type#). True after ENTITY.UPDATE if entity# has a rule-based hit against another body whose EntityType equals type# (requires COLLISIONS + EntityType). For other entity id use ENTITYCOLLIDED; for Jolt pair test use EntityCollided(a#, b#).

Args: (x#, y#, z#, srcEntity#, dstEntity#). Blitz alias of ENTITY.TFORMVECTOR: direction in src local space as linear transform into dst local space; returns heap handle to 3 float components (no world-entity shortcut).
True when the entity has floor support or is within coyote frames after leaving the ground (same as ENTITY.GROUNDED).
World XZ step from camera yaw: forward#/strafe# are deltas (typically speed*dt*input); camera is a Camera3D handle.
Same as ENTITY.MOVECAMERARELATIVE.

Live Discovery: Show arguments and description for any command.
Environmental: Enable fog (0=Off, 1=Linear, 2=Exp, 3=Exp2).
Environmental: Set global atmospheric haze color.
Environmental: Set thickness for exponential fog modes.
Professional: Set entity transparency (0.0=Invisible, 1.0=Solid).
Professional: Set entity specular highlight intensity.
Professional: Set entity blend mode (0=Alpha, 1=Additive, 2=Multiply).

Show or hide the real-time FPS graph overlay.

Automatically scan the world for static geometry and bake the navigation grid.
Render a debug overlay of the navigation grid (Green=Walkable, Red=Blocked).
Create a navigation agent for the specified grid handle.

Set the agent's movement speed: (handle, speed#)

Check if the agent has reached its destination.
Remove a post-processing effect by name (e.g. 'bloom', 'sharpen', or 'all').
Set the tonemapping mode: 0=None, 1=Linear, 2=Reinhard, 3=Filmic, 4=Uncharted2.
Set the fixed physics simulation timestep (e.g. 60.0, 90.0).
Set the fog mode: 0=None, 1=Linear, 2=Exponential.
Set the fog color: (r, g, b).
Set the fog density (0.0 to 1.0).
